rows.need: distinguish a research question from a result or answer
rows.title: Research Question Lens

rows.need: bind meeting actions to owner and due context without treating notes as completed work
rows.title: Meeting Action Item Lens

rows.need: preserve unresolved source conflict or the evidence that resolves it
rows.title: Source Conflict Resolution Lens

rows.need: detect visible calculation result phrases without solving hidden math
rows.title: Calculation Result Phrase Lens

rows.need: bind IO contracts to expected formats and outputs
rows.title: Input / Output Contract Lens

rows.need: avoid reusing stale cached state as current evidence
rows.title: Cache Staleness Guard

rows.need: avoid treating rhetorical questions as literal information requests
rows.title: Rhetorical Question Guard

rows.need: preserve evidence strength before promoting claims
rows.title: Evidence Strength Marker Lens

rows.need: preserve uncertainty ranges around measured values
rows.title: Measurement Uncertainty Lens

rows.need: bind failure causes to their mitigation actions
rows.title: Cause / Mitigation Pair Lens
